simple_types.name: Constant_Reference_Type
simple_types.code:
type Constant_Reference_Type (Element : not null access constant Element_Type) is private with
  Implicit_Dereference => Element;

tagged_types.name: Stack
tagged_types.code:
type Stack is new Ada.Finalization.Controlled with private
with
  Constant_Indexing => Constant_Reference,
  Default_Iterator  => Iterate,
  Iterator_Element  => Element_Type;

subprograms.code: function "=" (Left, Right : in Sguds.Stack) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Adjust
subprograms.code: procedure Adjust (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack)

subprograms.name: Bottom_Pop
subprograms.code: procedure Bottom_Pop (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack)

documentation.description:
Remove one item from the bottom of the stack (element
Stack.Depth), discard it.

subprograms.name: Clear
subprograms.code: procedure Clear (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack)

subprograms.name: Constant_Reference
subprograms.code:
function Constant_Reference
  (Container : aliased in Stack'Class;
   Position  :         in Cursor)
  return Constant_Reference_Type

subprograms.name: Constant_Reference
subprograms.code:
function Constant_Reference
  (Container : aliased in Stack'Class;
   Position  :         in Peek_Type)
  return Constant_Reference_Type

subprograms.name: Copy_Slice

documentation.description:
Copy elements Source.Peek (Source_Start_Depth) .. Source.Peek
(Source_Start_Depth - Count + 1) to Target (Target_Start_Depth) ..
Target (Target_Start_Depth - Count + 1), overwriting existing
Target elements.

subprograms.name: Depth
subprograms.code: function Depth (Stack : in Sguds.Stack) return Base_Peek_Type

documentation.description: Returns current count of items in the Stack

subprograms.name: Finalize
subprograms.code: procedure Finalize (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack)

subprograms.name: Has_Element
subprograms.code: function Has_Element (Position : in Cursor) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Invert
subprograms.code: function Invert (Stack : in Sguds.Stack) return Sguds.Stack

documentation.description: Return a new stack with the same elements as Stack, in inverted order.

subprograms.name: Is_Empty
subprograms.code: function Is_Empty (Stack : in Sguds.Stack) return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns true iff no items are in Stack.

subprograms.name: Iterate
subprograms.code: function Iterate (Container : aliased in Stack) return Iterator_Interfaces.Forward_Iterator'Class

subprograms.name: Peek
subprograms.code:
function Peek
  (Stack : in Sguds.Stack;
   Index : in Peek_Type := 1)
  return Element_Type

documentation.description:
Return the Index'th item from the top of Stack; the Item is _not_ removed.
Top item has index 1.

Raises Constraint_Error if Index > Depth.

See also Constant_Ref, implicit indexing

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: function Pop (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack) return Element_Type

documentation.description:
Remove Item from the top of Stack, and return it.

Raises Container_Empty if Is_Empty.

subprograms.name: Pop
subprograms.code: procedure Pop (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack; Count : in Base_Peek_Type := 1)

documentation.description:
Remove Count Items from the top of Stack, discard them.

Raises Container_Empty if there are fewer than Count items on
Stack.

subprograms.name: Push
subprograms.code: procedure Push (Stack : in out Sguds.Stack; Item : in Element_Type)

documentation.description:
Add Item to the top of Stack.

May raise Container_Full.

subprograms.name: Set

documentation.description:
Set a Stack element. Index is the same as Peek Index; Depth is
used to compute the index in the underlying array.

Stack must have been initialized by Set_Depth.

Useful when creating a stack from pre-existing data.

subprograms.name: Set_Depth

documentation.description:
Empty Stack, set its Depth to Depth. Must be followed by Set
for each element.

Useful when creating a stack from pre-existing data.

subprograms.name: Top
subprograms.code: function Top (Stack : in Sguds.Stack) return Element_Type

documentation.description:
Return the item at the top of Stack; the Item is _not_ removed.
Same as Peek (Stack, 1).

Raises Container_Empty if Is_Empty.

generic_instantiations.name: Iterator_Interfaces
generic_instantiations.code: package Iterator_Interfaces is new Ada.Iterator_Interfaces (Cursor, Has_Element);
